title: Login Issues – Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log into their account. They receive an error message saying 'Invalid credentials'.

title: Payment Failed – Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay invoice but card was declined multiple times.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download the invoice from dashboard.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Billing address appears incorrect after payment.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Mobile app crashes immediately when opened.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested refund but it hasn't been processed yet.

title: Feature Request – Dark Mode
description: Customer requested a dark mode option in the app.

title: Slow Website Performance
description: Website loads very slowly for some users.

title: Password Reset Email Not Received
description: Customer tried resetting password but no email received.

title: Error 500 on Checkout
description: Server returns Error 500 when customer tries to checkout.

title: Missing Order Confirmation
description: Customer did not receive confirmation after placing an order.

title: App Notifications Not Working
description: Push notifications are not received on Android devices.

title: UI Glitch on Dashboard
description: Widgets overlap when resizing the window.

title: Unable to Upload Profile Picture
description: Profile picture upload fails with unknown error.

title: Subscription Cancellation Issue
description: Customer cannot cancel subscription from dashboard.
